calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing (Notices)
Off Calendar May-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for request for default judgment against Defendant Harmik Yarijanian, Individually and Defendant Wego Transport, LLC.

Dept: 505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:22:49 a.m. and concluding at 9:36:59 a.m. (D505)

Catherine Robertson, Esq. representing Plaintiff REV Capital (California) Inc.
Defendant Harmik Yarijanian, Individually and Defendant Wego Transport, LLC not appearing.
Fahad Ali, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.
Michael Rakhnayev, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract filed August 15, 2023.
Proof of substituted service as to Defendant Harmik Yarijanian, Individually and Defendant Wego Transport, LLC on September 25,2023; effectuated on October 5, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Wego Transport, LLC on January 4, 2024.
Default entered as to Defendant Harmik Yarijanian, individually on January 9, 2023.
Dismissal filed as to Does 1 through 20, inclusive on November 7, 2023.

Counsel to summarize the causes of action and to offer proof of as to witness testimony.
Counsel to differentiate to the court between factoring fees and late charges.
Witness Fahad Ali is called to testify.
Witness confirms that counsel's statements, declarations, and exhibits submitted are true and correct to the best of his knowledge.
Witness Michael Rahknayev is called to testify.
Witness confirms that counsel's statements, declarations, and exhibits submitted are true and correct to the best of his knowledge.

Based on the testimony, declarations and filed exhibits, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has met their prima facie case.

The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff REV Capital (California) Inc and against Defendant Harmik Yarijanian, Individually and Defendant Wego Transport, LLC as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from Defendant:
Damages $307,540.85
Attorney's Fees $15,246.25
Interest $0
Costs $1,849.94
Factoring Fees and late charges $98,857.09
Total Judgment $423,494.13

Proposed judgment is signed and executed this day.

Notice Of Hearing (Notices)
Off Calendar May-14-2024 Continued To May-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Continued To Jul-24-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2023 Continued To Mar-20-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
